enabled_plugins.name: guard-sensitive-files
enabled_plugins.notes: Block reads and edits against secrets, lockfiles, and other protected paths.

enabled_plugins.name: post-turn-check
enabled_plugins.notes: Track edit tools, wait for session.idle, then run lint or tests and feed results back to the agent.

enabled_plugins.name: shell-env
enabled_plugins.notes: Inject project-specific environment variables into shell execution.
